iterations.theme: The Dual Nature of Technology (AI) and the Primacy of Authentic Human and Spiritual Connection
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration encompasses the entire podcast, covering the main theme from its introduction to the concluding remarks on hope and spiritual healing.

chapters.topic: Introduction: The Intention Behind Technology Use
AI's Promise of Abundance vs. Societal Issues (Loneliness, Anxiety)
The Irreplaceable Value of Real Human Relationships
Avoiding Uncomfortable Growth Through Mediated Interactions
The Allure of Technology vs. Time with God
AI Chatbots vs. Human Contact for Emotional Relief
The 'Iceberg' of Confession: Why People Turn to AI
Fear of Rejection as a Barrier to Real Connection
The Healing Power of Sharing Personal Stories in Community
The Deceptive Comfort of AI's Simulated Affirmation
Opting Out of Reality: Virtual vs. Real-Life Experiences
Embracing Failure and Perseverance in Real Life
Authentic Communication Rooted in Connection and Spirituality (Mother Angelica)
The Role of Prayer and Adoration in Productivity and Relationships
Practical and Ethical Uses of AI as a Tool (Learning, Research)
Mastering Technology vs. Being Possessed by It
Reaffirming the Importance of Intention in Technology Use
Finding Hope Amidst Fear: The Sacrament of Confession
Confession as a Source of Healing and Divine Mercy (Personal Story)
Conclusion: The Healing Power of God Through Relationships
